sections.paragraph:
φοῖνιξ/φοίνιξ, ικος, ὁthe phoenix, the fabulous bird of Egypt (since Hes., Fgm. 171 Rzach3=Fgm. 304 Merkelbach-West [Oxf. T.]; Hdt. 2, 73; Artem. 4, 47; Achilles Tat. 3, 25; PGM 5, 253; 12, 231; GrBar 6:10; 7:5; SibOr 8, 139; Celsus 4, 98; s. RKnopf, Hdb. exc. on 1 Cl 25) 1 Cl 25:2.—FSchöll, Vom Vogel Phönix 1890; FZimmermann, Die Phönixsage: ThGl 4, 1912, 202–23; THopfner, D. Tierkult der alten Ägypter: Denkschr. der Wiener Ak. 1914; JHubeaux/MLeroy, Le mythe du P. dans les litt. grecque et latine ’39; RClark, Origin of the Phoenix: University of Birmingham Historical Journal 2, ’49/50, 1ff; 105ff.; RvdBroek, The Myth of the Phoenix acc. to Class. and Early Christian Trad. ’72. Roscher III/2, 3450–72: Phönix; Pauly-W. XX 414–23; Kl. Pauly IV 799f; DACL XIV 682–91; Lexikon der Ägyptologie IV 1030ff.—DELG s.v. 4 φοῖνιξ.

Hes Hes , date uncertain, perh. before VI b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

West West = MWest, Iambi et Elegi Graeci—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

Achilles Tat Achilles Tat , IV a.d.—List 5

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

GrBar GrBar = Greek Baruch (Apocalypsis Baruchi Graece)—List 2

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

Celsus Celsus , in Origen, Contra Celsum, II a.d.—List 5

Hdb. Hdb. = Handbuch (in connection with a specific NT book, the ref. is to a commentary in the series Handbuch zum Neuen Testament, founded by HLietzmann)—List 6

exc. exc. = except

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

ThGl ThGl , s. TGl

Ak. Ak. =Akademie

acc. to acc. to = according to

Roscher Roscher = WR., Ausfürhliches Lexikon der . . . Mythologie—List 6

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

DACL DACL = Dictionnaire d’Archéologie chrétienne et de Liturgie—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1063
